examples: The car narrowly missed a cyclist.
He beeped his horn at the cyclist.
She swerved sharply to avoid a cyclist.
Investigators last spring subpoenaed several former U.S. Postal riders, including Mr. Hamilton and cyclist George Hincapie.
In 1979, 26-year-old cyclist Bryan Allen flew the man-powered "Gossamer Albatross" across the English Channel.
